content.en:
For these perfect controllers, as long as these eighteen peak half-step perfect controllers did not really fall, but only fell into the will clones, it was nothing, and the impact was not great.

Moreover, it is also an opportunity to sharpen one's sharpening.

Deep in the stone dragon abyss.

Ye Tian quickly approached the Hundred Desolation Golden Fruit, but suddenly, he stopped.

"Wild Golden Grass, and he also has a perfect-level ancestral endowment. "

Ye Tian was a little surprised.

This golden grass has a unique way of concealing its aura, but it is now in the process of metamorphosing, so it is easy to snoop on.

Of course, even if it was hidden deeply, Ye Tian's copying talent could easily lock it.

Perfect Ancestral Endowment: Hidden

"This perfect-level ancestral endowment is not bad, it was copied directly!"

Ye Tian instantly copied the perfect grade ancestor of this barren golden grass.

Plant-based organisms grow very slowly, and their intelligence is not high, and their potential is limited, so it is really remarkable that they can grow to this extent.

At this time, other peak half-step perfect controllers also came here, and everyone arrived at about the same time.

They also noticed the Desolate Golden Grass, but they didn't hesitate, but immediately rushed into the formation to snatch the Hundred Desolate Golden Fruit.

After all, the Hundred Desolation Golden Fruit is too attractive to them, and they don't want to give up the Hundred Desolation Golden Fruit.

"No matter how powerful this plant-based creature is, it may not be able to stop us!"

A pinnacle half-step perfect master turned on all his defenses and rushed over.

All he had to do was rush into the circle, and that would be victory.

The same was true of several other peak half-step perfect controllers, who rushed over one after another.

Suddenly, the barren golden grass made a move.

One after another, golden light shattered hundreds of millions of time and space, hitting these peak half-step perfect controllers.

Now.

The strength of the barren golden grass has reached the level of a pseudo-perfect master, but it is not comparable to a half-step perfect controller at the peak of the peak.

In an instant, a peak half-step perfect controller with a slightly weaker defense was directly hit through the body by a blow from Wild Grass Gold, and the terrifying power directly shattered the controlling body of this peak half-step perfect controller.

With just one blow, this peak half-step perfect controller fell.

The others were also uncomfortable, and they were hit hard one after another, and had to resort to life-saving means to retreat.

"Such a terrifying strength, obviously not a real perfect controller, you can instantly kill a peak half-step perfect controller, how terrible is the strength of a true perfect controller?

Ye Tian truly realized at this moment that the peak half-step perfect controller and the peak half-step perfect controller of the Extreme Creation Realm were completely two levels, and the gap was too big!

But.

He estimated that he could still break through.

Immediately, Ye Tian rushed over.

"Infinite Controller, this is looking for death, right? Didn't you see that a peak half-step perfect controller had just fallen, and he still dared to rush over?" said a peak half-step perfect controller in surprise.

Seeing that Ye Tian also rushed over, the barren golden grass directly killed Ye Tian.

Ye Tian directly used the top perfect controllers such as the Sky Devouring Battle Body, the Mist Body and the Devouring Domain, and did everything possible to fight against the Desolate Golden Grass.

I saw that a leaf of the Desolate Golden Grass instantly shattered Ye Tian's Devouring Domain, penetrating Ye Tian's Devouring Battle Body and Mist Body, but Ye Tian's Immunity Perfect-level Ancestral Endowment, Immortal Perfection-level Ancestral Endowment, and other top-notch perfect control techniques that could transfer damage transferred this damage.

Suddenly.

Ye Tian was barely harmed.

At this time, the barren golden grass was stunned.

But Ye Tian was not confused, he directly broke into the magic circle, and the barren golden grass was extremely annoyed, but he couldn't help Ye Tian.

"Come in! If the others can't get in, these Hundred Desolation Golden Fruits are mine!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

The other peak half-step perfect controllers were also aware of this problem, they didn't want all the Hundred Desolation Golden Fruits to fall into Ye Tian's hands, although the Hundred Desolation Golden Fruits were divided into space-time regions, but Ye Tian could cross space-time regions, after all, no one competed with him!

"You have to do whatever it takes!"

These peak half-step perfect controllers went crazy and rushed over.

......

"Hundred Desolation Golden Fruit, I found it!"

Ye Tian crossed the time and space region and saw a Hundred Desolation Golden Vine, and on top of this Hundred Desolation Golden Vine there was a Hundred Desolation Golden Fruit.

This Hundred Desolations Golden Fruit contains a strong material aura of creation.

Ye Tian had refined a large amount of Extreme Gold Liquid, so he was no stranger to the Extreme Creation Material Breath, and the Extreme Gold Substance contained in this Hundred Desolation Golden Fruit was far more than a drop of Extreme Gold Liquid, and the quality was also higher.

"The Extreme Gold Liquid is of little use to me, but this Hundred Desolation Golden Fruit is very good, and it is a different Extreme Creation Substance, which will help increase the potential of my controlled body!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Immediately, he took this golden fruit of the Hundred Desolations.

Immediately, he prepared to go to other space-time regions and take the other Hundred Desolation Golden Fruits.

Airplanes!

Ye Tian quickly locked on to a space-time area, and cast a fleeting shadow to shuttle through the past.

Finally, Ye Tian came to another space-time area in the magic circle, where he saw another Hundred Desolation Golden Vine, and saw a Hundred Desolation Golden Fruit.

Click!

This Hundred Desolations Golden Fruit is Ye Tian again!

Time passed slowly, and Ye Tian picked one after another the Golden Fruit of the Hundred Desolations.

However, just after Ye Tian picked six Hundred Desolation Golden Fruits, in another space-time area, he saw a pinnacle half-step perfect controller who had been severely injured.

This peak half-step perfect controller had already taken the Hundred Desolation Golden Fruit here.

This peak half-step perfect controller is the strongest peak half-step perfect controller of the Xuannu Sect - the Xuansha master.

Ye Tian glanced at the other party and did not make a move on her.

After all, once he attacked her and snatched her Hundred Desolation Golden Fruit, he would undoubtedly offend this Xuansha master, and even offend the Xuannu Sect, so it was not worth it.

Moreover, he had already obtained six Hundred Desolation Golden Fruits, and it was estimated that there were only two or three Hundred Desolation Golden Fruits left, and if he took them all, it would indeed be a bit excessive.

Swish!

Ye Tian shuttled away.

"He's gone!"

The Xuansha controller breathed a sigh of relief, if Ye Tian made a move on her, she wouldn't be able to resist!

After all, Ye Tian's strength was very strong, and she resisted the attack of the Wild Golden Grass and forcibly broke into here, but she didn't suffer any damage, which was not what she could do.

Therefore, she thinks that she is not as good as Ye Tian, not to mention that she is still seriously injured now, so she is naturally not Ye Tian's opponent.

If Ye Tian made a move on her, she wouldn't be able to keep her Hundred Desolation Golden Fruit at all.

"Heal first, and then leave after the healing is over, otherwise in the current state, once you leave here, you will definitely be killed by the Wild Golden Grass!"

The Xuansha controller said secretly.
